body:
Hey, everyone! I hope you all are enjoying Singularity! Unfortunately, we will have to delay the chat redesign.

We understand you have been waiting for what we realize is a long time as we polish up 0.10.0, which is why we're releasing the update as is and pushing off the chat redesign until later.

What this means is 0.10.0 will unfortunately not have the chat redesign or finished images as promised, but we are actively working on making the chat redesign happen!

Expect the chat redesign and finished images to release by 0.10.1. When the update releases, Singularity should have the chat redesign as promised.

Thank you for reading. Stay safe!

Hey, everyone! I hope you all are enjoying Singularity! The Chat box is currently undergoing a redesign!

Instead of a list, each chat will now show in its own box. If you're in App or Room Chat, you will be able to see what app people are chatting on! Anyone with updated Singularity/NewZay Hub clients will have their app's logo right next to their message.

Expect the chat redesign to release by 0.10.0 when images are finished. When the chat redesign comes out, you'll be able to view sent images just by clicking the message! You will also be able to copy a message by right-clicking it.

Thank you for reading. Stay safe!

Hey, everyone! I hope you all are enjoying Singularity! Singularity and OneJasp have teamed up to add a OneJasp integration into Singularity!

The OneJasp integration will allow Singularity users to sign in and create a Singularity account using their OneJasp account. When users sign in with their OneJasp account, if they have signed into NewZay Hub before, their username will carry over to Singularity.

Expect the OneJasp integration to be added in 0.10.0 with the release of Singularity accounts. When the OneJasp integration gets introduced, users who have a OneJasp account will be able to easily sign up for a Singularity account!

Thank you for reading. Stay safe!

Hey, everyone! I hope you all are enjoying Singularity! Soon, you will require a Singularity account to connect to Singularity.

In Singularity, you can currently choose any username without needing any verification that it's you. This can allow anyone to use your name and impersonate you. With the addition of Singularity accounts, this issue will be fixed.

You can create a free Singularity account with a unique username and password. This way, in order to use your name, you'll need a password.

Expect Singularity accounts to roll out in 0.10.0 and later be a requirement in 0.11.0. When Singularity accounts become a requirement, nobody will be able to use your username without your password, which will stop impersonators from sending messages as you.

Thank you for reading. Stay safe!

Hey, everyone! I hope you all are enjoying Singularity! We wanted to tell you about the status of images currently.

In Singularity, you can currently send images, but not view them. This means you'll need to copy the image data URI and paste it into your web browser. This is currently the case because images are a work in progress due to issues regarding users sending images through Singularity. Don't worry, this will be fixed soon.

Expect image viewing to be finished by 0.9.1 or 0.10.0. When images are fully finished, you'll be able to view images with no problem in Singularity.

Thank you for reading. Stay safe!
